Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-17-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S.Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Claudia Castillo, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Farga Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defendant: The Right People, Inc., a Corporation.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant as follows:
Principal $202,456.92
Interest $18,462.64
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $360.80
Late charges $143.74
Judgment signed in open court.
